title: Mooder's Lifesteal
description: This project adds a simple lifesteal server with direct heart stealing, a way to withdraw hearts, and a way to setup a revival net for yourself one you lose all your hearts.
body:
This is a simple Lifesteal pack made for quick and easy Lifesteal, hosting a few mechanics:
- **Direct Lifesteal**: Killing a player automatically gives you their heart, requiring no middleman.
- **Heart Item**: Players who would like to gain hearts without PVP can craft it. (recipes down below)

It can also be used with the resource pack to make the hearts look like, well hearts!

Heart Recipe:
![The Heart Recipe (make that structure void look like an empty heart in ur head)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a0c7e39ca5f5bd076be9f7fbd7913031b42c7dd.jpeg)

Empty Heart Recipe:
![The Empty Heart Recipe (make it look like an empty heart again)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea782c3d888cb688bc9d1565958012f86d9e8a2f.jpeg)
